<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->
- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
  Summary: Created this file in .github.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Building a premium mobile-first web app and admin console for Ollama using Next.js, TypeScript, App Router, and a server-side API layer.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Bootstrapped a Next.js TypeScript App Router project in the current folder with Tailwind, ESLint, and npm.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Replaced the starter page with a premium mobile-first shell and added a server-side Ollama status layer.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No extensions were required by the project setup information.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Verified the project with `npm run lint` and `npm run build` successfully.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: Added and launched a `dev server` VS Code task that runs `npm run dev`.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: Started local development mode for verification, then switched to LAN development mode for device testing on the same network.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: Verified README coverage and cleaned this checklist into its final project state.
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
